ab: Tinpitu tukii saak haip tunahaan pasnanava’an.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Nakitngaa’in mapasnava, mukumbu masnanava munhaan pasnanava’an. Tupa lalavian tu,” Mindangkaza! Masumsuma!"
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Tusqit saam tupa tu,” Uninang! Masnanava!"
Maaq tu maspasnava a, isnava’an saam masnanava malasBunun masisipul.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Bunun language of numbers.

ab: Makilansan saam masnanava masipul, tusuas i masisipul tu sintusaus.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Mapinqansiapin saak madia malasBunun tu qalinga.
en: I have learned many Bunun languages.

ab: Daqdaqanin saak munhaan pasnanava’an, lusbut mapasnava malasBunun, nabazbaz saak mapatan’a tina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Bunun language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
